code:
import io
import string

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  let n = string.len(line)
  mut sum = 0
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    # skip whitespace
    while i < n and is_ws(match string.byte_at(line, i) when Some(b) b when None 0 end)
      i = i + 1
    end
    if i >= n
      i = n
    else
      mut j = i
      while j < n and not is_ws(match string.byte_at(line, j) when Some(b) b when None 0 end)
        j = j + 1
      end
      let tok = string.substring(line, i, j)
      match string.parse_int(tok)
      when Some(v)
        if v > 0
          sum = sum + v * 2
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      i = j
    end
  end

  println("result=#{sum}")
end
